message:
feat(tui): add goal summary header to responsive TUI layout

Adds an optional goal summary header area to the TUI that displays
resource recovery goal status when --goal is active.

app.rs:
- Add goal_summary: Option<Vec<String>> field to App state
- Add set_goal_summary() and clear_goal_summary() methods
- Conditionally request header area via main_areas_with_header(2)
  when goal summary lines are present
- Add render_goal_summary() drawing a bordered paragraph with the
  goal status lines using the app theme

layout.rs:
- Add header: Option<Rect> field to MainAreas struct
- Add main_areas_with_header(header_height) method that threads
  an optional header constraint through all four breakpoint layouts
  (Wide, Standard, Compact, Minimal)
- Refactor main_areas_wide/standard/compact/minimal to accept
  header_height parameter and compute header/search/content/status
  chunk indices dynamically

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
